mapper.select: WITH RAW_SUMS AS ( SELECT SYMBOL, SUM(PRICE * QTY) AS RAW_VOL, SUM(FEE_AMOUNT) AS RAW_FEE FROM TRADES WHERE CREATED_AT >= #{since} GROUP BY SYMBOL ) SELECT M.SYMBOL AS SYMBOL, M.QUOTE_CURRENCY AS QUOTE_CURRENCY, M.FEE_RATE AS CURRENT_FEE_RATE, COALESCE(R.RAW_VOL / POWER(10, COALESCE(M.PRICE_DECIMALS, 2)), 0.0) AS VOLUME, COALESCE(R.RAW_FEE, 0.0) AS FEES FROM MARKETS M LEFT JOIN RAW_SUMS R ON M.SYMBOL = R.SYMBOL WHERE M.IS_ACTIVE = TRUE

WITH RAW_SUMS AS ( SELECT SYMBOL, SUM(PRICE * QTY) AS RAW_VOL, SUM(FEE_AMOUNT) AS RAW_FEE FROM TRADES GROUP BY SYMBOL ) SELECT M.SYMBOL AS SYMBOL, M.QUOTE_CURRENCY AS QUOTE_CURRENCY, M.FEE_RATE AS CURRENT_FEE_RATE, COALESCE(R.RAW_VOL / POWER(10, COALESCE(M.PRICE_DECIMALS, 2)), 0.0) AS VOLUME, COALESCE(R.RAW_FEE, 0.0) AS FEES FROM MARKETS M LEFT JOIN RAW_SUMS R ON M.SYMBOL = R.SYMBOL WHERE M.IS_ACTIVE = TRUE
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT USER_ID) FROM ( SELECT USER_ID FROM ORDERS WHERE CREATED_AT >= #{since} UNION SELECT USER_ID FROM LEDGER_JOURNAL WHERE CREATED_AT >= #{since} ) AS ACTIVE_USERS
SELECT CURRENCY AS CURRENCY, COALESCE(SUM(AMOUNT), 0.0) AS NETFLOW FROM LEDGER_JOURNAL WHERE TYPE IN ('DEPOSIT', 'WITHDRAWAL') AND CREATED_AT >= #{since} GROUP BY CURRENCY
SELECT CURRENCY AS CURRENCY, SUM(BALANCE + LOCKED_BALANCE) AS TOTALBALANCE FROM WALLETS GROUP BY CURRENCY

WITH RAW_SUMS AS ( SELECT SYMBOL, SUM(PRICE * QTY) AS RAW_VOL FROM TRADES WHERE CREATED_AT >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY SYMBOL ) SELECT M.SYMBOL AS SYMBOL, M.QUOTE_CURRENCY AS QUOTE_CURRENCY, COALESCE(R.RAW_VOL / POWER(10, COALESCE(M.PRICE_DECIMALS, 2)), 0.0) AS VOLUME FROM MARKETS M LEFT JOIN RAW_SUMS R ON M.SYMBOL = R.SYMBOL WHERE M.IS_ACTIVE = TRUE

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'FILLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS FILLED, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS CANCELLED, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS IN ('NEW', 'PARTIALLY_FILLED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS ACTIVE FROM ORDERS WHERE CREATED_AT >= #{since}

WITH RECENT_TRADES AS ( SELECT TRADE_ID, SYMBOL, PRICE, QTY, CREATED_AT FROM TRADES WHERE SYMBOL = #{symbol} ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{tradeLimit} ) SELECT (CAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM T.CREATED_AT) AS BIGINT) / #{bucketSizeSeconds}) * #{bucketSizeSeconds} AS TIME, (ARRAY_AGG(T.PRICE ORDER BY T.TRADE_ID ASC))[1] / POWER(10, COALESCE(MAX(M.PRICE_DECIMALS), 2)) AS OPEN, MAX(T.PRICE) / POWER(10, COALESCE(MAX(M.PRICE_DECIMALS), 2)) AS HIGH, MIN(T.PRICE) / POWER(10, COALESCE(MAX(M.PRICE_DECIMALS), 2)) AS LOW, (ARRAY_AGG(T.PRICE ORDER BY T.TRADE_ID DESC))[1] / POWER(10, COALESCE(MAX(M.PRICE_DECIMALS), 2)) AS CLOSE, SUM(T.QTY) AS VOLUME FROM RECENT_TRADES T LEFT JOIN MARKETS M ON T.SYMBOL = M.SYMBOL GROUP BY TIME ORDER BY TIME DESC LIMIT #{limit}
